title: senml_encode_location allows NaN/Inf lat/lon without validation
close_reason: Fixed: Added validation for lat/lon in senml_encode_location. Now rejects NaN/Inf with -EINVAL and out-of-range coordinates (lat outside -90..90, lon outside -180..180) with -ERANGE. Added ERANGE to errno.h and 7 new tests covering all validation cases.
